base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of paper_treasure_map_radiant_stone — a ui from 1986 dragon quest. 'Paper treasure map' scroll sprite — parchment with brown border + marker indicating hidden item (Staff of Rain or Radiant Stone search hints). In-game used to gate progression toward Dragonlord's island. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'Paper treasure map' scroll sprite — parchment with brown border + marker indicating hidden item (Staff of Rain or Radiant Stone search hints). In-game used to gate progression toward Dragonlord's island
